name: Platters"dishpan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream butter and sugar. Add vanilla, eggs, and brown sugar. Mix together well.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda into a bowl.
4. Beat the sifted ingredients into the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in cornflakes, oatmeal, coconut, nuts, and chocolate chips using a large spoon.
6. Bake on shiny baking pans (this makes a big difference) for 10 - 12 minutes.
7. Cool; remove from pans.
8. Substitute peanut butter chips or butterscotch chips if desired.
